name: Jess Reid, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Enter to win a chance to meet Michelle Kwan!
body:
| Peter --

The Olympics never get old for me -- every two years, you can find me glued to my couch, watching our athletes rocking it on the beam, the track, the slopes, and the rink. They’re role models for all of us, including the folks who work on this campaign! (You won’t find a louder crowd of USA gymnastics fans than you will at Hillary for Virginia HQ.)

That’s why I’m so honored that one of my own heroes, two-time figure skating medalist Michelle Kwan, is taking some time out of her schedule to come say hi -- **[and if you sign up to receive text messages from us, you will be automatically entered to win the chance to have coffee with Michelle on August 18th right here in Virginia! Sign up now.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjYyMzE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMzE3NDEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Getting texts is a great way to keep up with breaking campaign news. For example, you’ll be the first to know when Hillary or our own Tim Kaine are headed to a town near you!

Meeting Michelle is a pretty cool bonus, too -- after watching her in the 1998 Olympics, I made my mom sign me up for figure skating lessons (thankfully those videos are lost to history). Best of all, she’s the warmest person you could imagine, and she’s putting her fierce work ethic into helping elect Hillary this year.

**We can’t wait to have you join Michelle and three of our most dedicated volunteers for coffee and a chat. All you have to do is join our text list:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyMzE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMzE3NDEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks so much, Peter -- Michelle can’t wait to meet you.

Jess

Jessalyn Reid
Virginia Digital Director
Hillary for America

body:
Before the primary, Bryant launched a nearly $1,000,000 ad buy -- here's how. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTM1Mjk2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMTE1MTM3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

So today I'm asking you directly: Chip in $5 right away. _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=OTM1Mjk2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMTE1MTM3S0&mt=2&rj=OTgxMTE1MTM3S0&rt=0)

**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=OTM1Mjk2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMTE1MTM3S0&mt=2&rj=OTgxMTE1MTM3S0&rt=0)**
There are two big reasons I'm asking for your support today:
1. **Strategy** : Our team needs to be able to respond to the influx of money Bryant is sure to receive ahead of the election. If he can go from $150,000 to a nearly $1,000,000 ad buy in under three weeks before the primary, just imagine what can happen before November. It's imperative that we're prepared to respond -- now.

2. **Values** : If we don't stand up to the millionaire and billionaire class trying to buy our election, who will? One of the biggest donors to Bryant those last few weeks was one of Donald Trump's biggest super PAC backers. This is about stopping the ultra-wealthy from buying our election.

[**To win this November, to live up to our values, chip in $5 today!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTM1Mjk2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMTE1MTM3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
I'm honestly nervous about the big-money attacks we'll face before November. But I'm also more convinced than ever that, together, we can run and win this campaign as a grassroots movement for progress.
[**JayInslee.com/Fight-Back**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTM1Mjk2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMTE1MTM3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks!
Aisling Kerins

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I’d love to meet you, Peter
body:
Meet me on the campaign trail? | Peter --

When I ran my first race for City Council in Richmond, I didn’t win all by myself. I won because of the incredible supporters and volunteers who knocked on doors, made calls, organized precincts, and talked to their friends about why the race mattered.

Getting to know those folks was important to me then -- and it still is today.

That's why when the team at HQ asked me if I was interested in meeting you, I jumped at the chance. **[Would you be interested in fitting me into your schedule and hitting the campaign trail with me?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYyMzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMzE5MjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I want to learn from you about what you’re seeing in your community, how we can improve our campaign, and how we can work together to win this November. (After all -- the future of our country depends on it!)

**What do you think? Sign up to volunteer right now and you’ll be entered for the chance to meet me on the campaign trail:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYyMzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMzE5MjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Hope to see you soon,

Tim

|
**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary -- and be automatically entered to meet Tim Kaine on the campaign trail!**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyMzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMzE5MjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Can I count on you? | Friend -- Did you see Aisling's note? I'm proud of my team and the campaign we're building together. But from a strategy perspective, and more importantly because of our progressive values, I need your help right now in fighting back against my opponent's millionaire and billionaire friends. With so much money being funneled to the other side of this race, winning this November will take a grassroots movement. I'm counting on you. | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTM1Mjk2MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMTE0NzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Aisling Kerins, JayInslee.com
Date: Saturday, August 13, 2016
Subject: Chip in $5 [Here's why]

Dear Friend,
In the three weeks before the primary, Republican Bill Bryant went from having $150,000 to spend, to a nearly $1,000,000 ad buy thanks to a few ultra-wealthy donors. So today I'm asking you directly: Chip in $5 right away.

**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=OTM1Mjk2MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMTE0NzcxS0&mt=2&rj=OTgxMTE0NzcxS0&rt=0)**
There are two big reasons I'm asking for your support today:
1. **Strategy** : Our team needs to be able to respond to the influx of money Bryant is sure to receive ahead of the election. If he can go from $150,000 to a nearly $1,000,000 ad buy in under three weeks before the primary, just imagine what can happen before November. It's imperative that we're prepared to respond -- now.

2. **Values** : If we don't stand up to the millionaire and billionaire class trying to buy our election, who will? One of the biggest donors to Bryant those last few weeks was one of Donald Trump's biggest super PAC backers. This is about stopping the ultra-wealthy from buying our election.

[**To win this November, to live up to our values, chip in $5 today!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTM1Mjk2MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMTE0NzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
I'm honestly nervous about the big-money attacks we'll face before November. But I'm also more convinced than ever that, together, we can run and win this campaign as a grassroots movement for progress.
[**JayInslee.com/Fight-Back**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTM1Mjk2MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMTE0NzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Bullock
subject: do you know what today is?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:

"How old was Noah when he built the ark? 600. He wasn't like, cashing Social Security checks, he wasn't hanging out, he was working. So, I think we have an obligation to work.... but the concept of retirement is not Biblical." \-- Greg Gianforte

Friend,

Today is the 81st anniversary of Social Security. Since its passage, it has helped ensure the retirement security of scores of Montana seniors. So it's all the more galling that Greg Gianforte _actually_ said that.

It's a stunning lack of respect for all the Montanans who spent their lives working hard, paid into the system and earned their right to retire with dignity. **We can't let someone this out of touch ever sit in the governor 's office. [Please donate 15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2FPMl5rveBWlsmnkfgFlvfC99NmZadFpK)**

Team Bullock

name: Hillary for Virginia
subject: Before midnight: Enter for a chance to meet Michelle Kwan!
body:
| Peter --

You still have time to be automatically entered to win the chance to have coffee with Michelle Kwan -- just sign up to receive campaign text messages before midnight tonight!

**Don't miss this amazing opportunity to meet Michelle in Virginia while learning more about the campaign -- add your name right now to sign up for our SMS list:**
| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyMzUyMjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNDA5NjU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks!

Hillary for Virginia

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Jess Reid, HillaryClinton.com
Subject: Enter to win a chance to meet Michelle Kwan!

Peter --

The Olympics never get old for me -- every two years, you can find me glued to my couch, watching our athletes rocking it on the beam, the track, the slopes, and the rink. They’re role models for all of us, including the folks who work on this campaign! (You won’t find a louder crowd of USA gymnastics fans than you will at Hillary for Virginia HQ.)

That’s why I’m so honored that one of my own heroes, two-time figure skating medalist Michelle Kwan, is taking some time out of her schedule to come say hi -- **[and if you sign up to receive text messages from us, you will be automatically entered to win the chance to have coffee with Michelle on August 18th right here in Virginia! Sign up now.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjYyMzUyMjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNDA5NjU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Getting texts is a great way to keep up with breaking campaign news. For example, you’ll be the first to know when Hillary or our own Tim Kaine are headed to a town near you!

Meeting Michelle is a pretty cool bonus, too -- after watching her in the 1998 Olympics, I made my mom sign me up for figure skating lessons (thankfully those videos are lost to history). Best of all, she’s the warmest person you could imagine, and she’s putting her fierce work ethic into helping elect Hillary this year.

**We can’t wait to have you join Michelle and three of our most dedicated volunteers for coffee and a chat. All you have to do is join our text list:**

Thanks so much, Peter -- Michelle can’t wait to meet you.

Jess

name: Anne Holton
subject: Hi, Peter -- I’m Anne
body:
Tim is excited to meet you | Peter --

I'm Anne Holton, and I've been married to Tim Kaine for more than 30 years -- I'm so pleased to meet you.

I can tell you one thing about Tim: There’s absolutely no one I’d rather spend time with. He can take any random day and make it more fun, more special, and something you’ll always remember.

When we’re on a road trip, you can count on Tim to turn off the GPS and show you a hidden scenic route (then tell you what’s so historic about it). He’s always ready with a fun piece of trivia or one of his trademark dad jokes, and there’s absolutely nothing he loves more than getting to know new people. When we go to a party or event, he won’t leave until he’s said hello to everyone -- that's just who he is.

I know he’s really excited to meet you, especially since you’re one of Hillary’s best supporters. **I think it's great that if you sign up to volunteer, the campaign may fly you and a guest out to meet Tim on the campaign trail. And I know you will have the best time together -- you’d better hurry and get your name in for a chance to win!**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYyMzU1NzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNDE2NzU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks, Peter -- I can’t wait to hear all about your time on the trail with Tim.

Anne
